# freeipa_hbacrule (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA HBAC (Host-Based Access Control) rules.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the HBAC rule.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the HBAC rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the HBAC rule is enabled.
- `groups` (Set of String) Set of user groups associated with the rule.
- `host_category` (String) Host category (e.g. 'all' to apply to all hosts, or null).
- `hosts` (Set of String) Set of host FQDNs associated with the rule.
- `service_category` (String) Service category (e.g. 'all' to apply to all services, or null).
- `services` (Set of String) Set of HBAC service names associated with the rule.
- `user_category` (String) User category (e.g. 'all' to apply to all users, or null).
- `users` (Set of String) Set of usernames associated with the rule.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the HBAC rule.
